scoring_formula: code_health per language = max(0, 100 - 15*error - 5*warning) — HIGHER is safer (this is a health/safety score, deliberately NOT named 'risk'); note findings are informational and never affect health; overall = file-count-weighted average, ALWAYS reported alongside lowest language and error count. analysis_confidence = coverage-v2 (experimental): round(100 * file_coverage * manifest_coverage * (0.5 + 0.5*registry_coverage) * rule_health * parse_factor * semgrep_factor) where file_coverage = read/(read+skipped), manifest_coverage = 1 - affected_manifest_files/unique_manifest_files where affected = union(errored, incomplete) by canonical path (a partially-extracted manifest or a missing/outside include counts too), registry_coverage = 0 offline else 1 - failures/attempted, rule_health = 1 - rule_failures/rule_attempted (uncapped), parse_factor = 1 - min(1, parse_errors/files_read) (uncapped), semgrep_factor = 1.0 success / 0.97 partial / 0.95 otherwise. verdict: block if error>0 or confidence<40 or ALL rule invocations failed; review if warning>0 or confidence<70 or any manifest/rule/parse failure; else pass — any rule failure forbids pass.

findings.snippet: API_KEY = "***"  # planted AWS-style key for Engine 2

findings.title: Empty or exception-swallowing catch/except block
findings.detail: Exception is silently swallowed — failures become invisible.

findings.title: AI-style incompleteness comment
findings.detail: Marker 'TODO: implement' suggests incomplete/demo-grade code left by generation.

findings.title: AI-style incompleteness comment
findings.snippet: # In a real application, use parameterized queries
findings.detail: Marker 'In a real app' suggests incomplete/demo-grade code left by generation.

findings.title: String-composed SQL reaches an execution sink
findings.detail: Composed SQL is passed to 'cursor.execute' — SQL injection risk; use parameterized queries.

findings.detail: classify has cyclomatic complexity 11 (> 10).

findings.detail: requests: registry check skipped (--offline)

findings.title: Dependency not verified (offline mode)
findings.detail: ghost-ai-utils: registry check skipped (--offline)

findings.title: NEXT_PUBLIC_ variable with secret-like name (exposed to client bundle)
findings.detail: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_SECRET in .env.local ships to the client bundle.

findings.title: Client-only API in a module reachable from a Server Component
findings.detail: useState runs in a SERVER import path (module-graph); add "use client" at the boundary that should own this file.

findings.title: Client-only API in a module reachable from a Server Component
findings.detail: onClick event handler in a SERVER import path (module-graph).

findings.title: React hook called conditionally (if/loop/ternary/logical/try, or after early return)
findings.detail: useState is called inside a if statement; hooks must run unconditionally at the top level.

findings.title: useEffect without dependency array
findings.detail: useEffect has no dependency array; it re-runs after every render.

findings.title: dangerouslySetInnerHTML with a non-literal value
findings.detail: __html is not a proven string literal; any user-influenced content here is an XSS vector (heuristic — no taint analysis).

findings.title: List key uses array index
findings.detail: key={index} is the .map() index; reordering or deleting items will confuse React reconciliation.

limitations: Offline mode: no registry verification was performed.
semgrep layer: disabled by --no-semgrep (builtin rules only).
Undetectable private-source channels (env vars, ~/.m2/settings.xml mirrors, CI config) cannot be ruled out for not-found packages.
Private registries are NEVER contacted; packages behind them are classified unverified (H010), and the public registry is not treated as the source of truth for them.

catalog.title: async void method
catalog.description: async void methods hide exceptions from callers; use async Task.

catalog.title: Blocking on async (.Result/.Wait)
catalog.description: .Result/.Wait() on tasks risks deadlocks in sync contexts.

catalog.title: Raw SQL string interpolation
catalog.description: Interpolated/concatenated strings flow into raw SQL APIs.

catalog.title: Declared dependency not in registry
catalog.description: A definitely-declared dependency does not exist in its public registry.

catalog.title: Undeclared import (package exists in registry)
catalog.description: An import is not declared in any manifest but a same-named public package exists.

catalog.title: Registry check skipped (offline)
catalog.description: Offline mode: the external import could not be verified against a registry.

catalog.title: Registry unreachable
catalog.description: The registry lookup failed (network/service error); existence unknown.

catalog.title: Brand-new package with no downloads
catalog.description: The resolved package is very recently published with no adoption signal.

catalog.title: Fresh package
catalog.description: The resolved package is newer than the freshness threshold.

catalog.title: Unverified undeclared import (unmappable, or probable-hallucination via a heuristic mapping)
catalog.description: The import cannot be mapped exactly; any registry name came from a heuristic mapping, or the declaration is conditional.

catalog.title: Hallucinated import (exact mapping, absent from registry)
catalog.description: An import whose registry name comes from an EXACT (literal) mapping does not exist in the public registry.

catalog.title: Quarantined package
catalog.description: The declared/resolved package is quarantined by the registry (PEP 792).

catalog.title: Private source configured — unverifiable
catalog.description: A private registry/source is configured; the package is classified unverifiable, and the public registry is not treated as its source of truth.

catalog.title: Archived package
catalog.description: The resolved package is archived by the registry (PEP 792).

catalog.title: String comparison with ==
catalog.description: Strings compared with ==/!= instead of equals().

catalog.title: Missing try-with-resources
catalog.description: An AutoCloseable resource is opened outside try-with-resources.

catalog.title: Secret exposed via NEXT_PUBLIC_*
catalog.description: A secret-named NEXT_PUBLIC_ variable is defined in code or .env* (value never echoed).

catalog.title: Private env read in client code
catalog.description: A non-public environment variable is read from a client component.

catalog.title: Client API in a server component (per-file)
catalog.description: Browser/client-only APIs are used in a file treated as a server component by the per-file fallback.

catalog.title: server-only import in client code
catalog.description: A module marked server-only is imported from a client component.

catalog.title: Async client component
catalog.description: A client component is declared async, which React does not support.

catalog.title: Client API on a server module-graph path
catalog.description: Dual-state BFS over the app/ module graph proves a client-only API is reachable in a server context (orphans analyzed as server default).

catalog.title: Empty or exception-swallowing catch/except block
catalog.description: A catch/except block silently swallows errors (empty or bare pass/ignore).

catalog.title: Hardcoded secret (known token format)
catalog.description: A literal matches a known credential/token shape; the value is masked in reports.

catalog.title: Suspicious credential assignment
catalog.description: A credential-named variable is assigned a literal value.

catalog.title: String-composed SQL
catalog.description: SQL text is built via string concatenation/interpolation.

catalog.title: String-composed SQL reaches an execution sink
catalog.description: String-built SQL flows into an execution call (injection candidate).

catalog.title: Cyclomatic complexity above 10
catalog.description: A function's cyclomatic complexity exceeds 10 (measured by lizard).

catalog.title: AI-style incompleteness comment
catalog.description: A TODO/placeholder comment typical of AI-generated incomplete code.

catalog.title: Stdlib drift vs requires-python
catalog.description: Imports use stdlib modules added after (or removed before) the project's declared requires-python range.

catalog.title: Conditional hook call
catalog.description: A React hook is called inside if/loop/ternary/&&/try or after an early return.

catalog.title: Hook inside a hook callback
catalog.description: A hook is called inside a callback passed to another hook.

catalog.title: Hook outside component or custom hook
catalog.description: A hook is called from a function that is neither a component nor a use* hook (memo/forwardRef exempt).

catalog.title: useEffect without dependency array
catalog.description: An effect omits its dependency array and re-runs on every render.

catalog.title: Obviously missing effect dependencies
catalog.description: Identifiers used inside the effect are absent from its dependency array.

catalog.title: List key uses array index
catalog.description: key={index} defeats React reconciliation for reorderable lists.

catalog.title: Non-literal dangerouslySetInnerHTML
catalog.description: dangerouslySetInnerHTML receives a non-literal __html value (XSS vector pattern).

catalog.title: Runtime.exec with concatenated input (command injection).
catalog.description: Runtime.exec with concatenated input (command injection).

catalog.title: Shell command built from dynamic strings (command injection).
catalog.description: Shell command built from dynamic strings (command injection).

catalog.title: eval()/exec() on dynamic input executes arbitrary code.
catalog.description: eval()/exec() on dynamic input executes arbitrary code.

catalog.title: pickle.load/loads on untrusted data enables code execution.
catalog.description: pickle.load/loads on untrusted data enables code execution.

catalog.title: MD5/SHA1 are broken for security purposes.
catalog.description: MD5/SHA1 are broken for security purposes.
